description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure rendered in a realistic, classical style. The man is nude, with a muscular build, curly hair, and a full beard, standing on an irregularly shaped base. His left arm is extended outward, hand open as if gesturing or holding something, while his right hand rests near his hip. The surface of the sculpture has a weathered, patinated appearance, suggesting it is cast in bronze or a similar metal. The anatomical details, such as the musculature, veins, and facial features, are finely modeled, giving the figure a lifelike presence. The base is textured and uneven, anchoring the figure solidly to the ground.
description: A realistic, classical-style bronze sculpture of a nude bearded man standing on a textured base with one arm extended. The figure is detailed and lifelike, with a weathered patina.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the man's face, extended left arm, and detailed torso and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the outstretched arm, and the muscular back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back muscles, hair, and the stance of both legs on the base.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the right arm at the hip and the side profile of the head and torso.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
